goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 21:00' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'london kings cross'.
Make sure you get 'price', 'travel time', and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'north' and should have 'a star of 3'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking' and 'whether they have internet'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 21:00 and should leave on tuesday
The train should go to cambridge and should depart from london kings cross
Make sure you get price, travel time, and departure time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the north and should have a star of 3
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should be in the moderate price range
Make sure you get whether they have free parking and whether they have internet
